title: fix(enter): prevent wrapping in dev points tooltip
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: Room to breathe
gist.blurb: We ironed out a visual wrinkle in the tier explanation tooltip. No more awkwardly squished text when checking your pollen balance!
gist.summary: Fixed a UI layout issue in the tier explanation tooltip by increasing its width and preventing text wrapping in table cells.
gist.impact: Users will now see a cleanly formatted, easy-to-read table when hovering over their tier status.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee fixing a squished UI element. She could be using a tiny rolling pin to flatten and stretch out a squished digital text box or sign, making it wide and readable. The Monitor Robot watches happily.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot using a tiny wooden rolling pin to flatten and stretch out a squished digital text box on a wooden table. A chunky retro monitor robot watches happily, its screen glowing with soft lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
